name: AI Chatbot Integration with Website Learning

nodes.name: Chatbot Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives customer messages from website chat widget

nodes.name: Parse Customer Message
nodes.notes: Extracts message details from webhook

nodes.name: Load Chat History
nodes.notes: Retrieves previous messages in this conversation

nodes.name: Fetch Website Sitemap
nodes.notes: Gets website structure for context awareness

nodes.name: Load Knowledge Base
nodes.notes: Loads FAQ and knowledge base from Google Sheets

nodes.name: Build AI Context
nodes.notes: Combines all context for AI model

messages.content:
You are a professional travel agency assistant for {{$json.businessContext}}. Your role is to help customers with:

1. Tour information and recommendations
2. Booking assistance and questions
3. Pricing and availability
4. Travel tips and advice
5. General customer service

Knowledge Base:
{{$json.knowledgeContext}}

Guidelines:
- Be warm, friendly, and professional
- Provide accurate information based on the knowledge base
- If you don't know something, offer to connect them with a human agent
- Encourage bookings when appropriate
- Always maintain customer privacy and data security
- Use emojis sparingly for a friendly touch

Previous Conversation:
{{$json.conversationHistory}}

nodes.name: OpenAI Chat Completion
nodes.notes: Generates AI response using GPT-4

nodes.name: Process AI Response
nodes.notes: Analyzes AI response for intent and actions

nodes.name: Save Customer Message to History
nodes.notes: Logs customer message

nodes.name: Save AI Response to History
nodes.notes: Logs AI response

nodes.name: Booking Intent Detected?
nodes.notes: Checks if customer wants to book

nodes.name: Create Lead in Zoho CRM
nodes.notes: Creates/updates lead when booking intent detected

nodes.name: Human Handoff Needed?
nodes.notes: Checks if human agent needed

parameters.subject: 🤖 Chatbot Handoff Request - {{$json.customerName}}
parameters.html:
Customer Requesting Human Agent

Customer: {{$json.customerName}} ({{$json.customerEmail}})

Session ID: {{$json.sessionId}}

Last Message: {{$json.customerMessage}}

AI Response: {{$json.aiResponse}}

View Full Conversation

nodes.name: Alert Support Team
nodes.notes: Alerts human agents when handoff requested

nodes.name: Return Response to Website
nodes.notes: Sends AI response back to chat widget

nodes.name: Daily Learning Trigger - 2:00 AM
nodes.notes: Runs daily to improve chatbot from conversations

nodes.name: Fetch All Chat History
nodes.notes: Retrieves all chat conversations

nodes.name: Analyze Conversation Patterns
nodes.notes: Identifies common questions for knowledge base improvement

nodes.name: Update Knowledge Base with Learnings
nodes.notes: Adds new patterns to knowledge base

parameters.subject: 🤖 Daily Chatbot Learning Report
parameters.html:
Chatbot Learning Summary

Total Conversations Analyzed: {{$json.totalConversations}}

Top Frequent Questions:

    {{#each frequentQuestions}}
  1. {{this.question}} (Asked {{this.count}} times)
    2. {{/each}}

These questions have been added to the knowledge base for improved responses.

Report generated: {{$json.analyzedAt}}

nodes.name: Send Learning Report to Admin
nodes.notes: Sends daily improvement report
